–°—В–≤–Њ—А–Є SQL –Љ—Ц–≥—А–∞—Ж—Ц—О `supabase/migrations/052_portfolio_service_link.sql`.

–Ґ–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж—П portfolio_photos –≤–ґ–µ —Ц—Б–љ—Г—Ф (migration 014):
  id, master_id, url, storage_path, caption, sort_order, created_at

–Ф–Њ–і–∞–є –Ї–Њ–ї–Њ–љ–Ї—Г:
  ALTER TABLE portfolio_photos
    ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS service_id UUID REFERENCES services(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_portfolio_service ON portfolio_photos(service_id) WHERE service_id IS NOT NULL;

–Ъ–Њ–Љ–µ–љ—В–∞—А –љ–∞ –њ–Њ—З–∞—В–Ї—Г —Д–∞–є–ї—Г: "-- –Я—А–Є–≤'—П–Ј–Ї–∞ —Д–Њ—В–Њ –њ–Њ—А—В—Д–Њ–ї—Ц–Њ –і–Њ –њ–Њ—Б–ї—Г–≥–Є –Љ–∞–є—Б—В—А–∞ (Book this look)"

task-1774710479325-vl4q96.description:
–Ю–љ–Њ–≤–Є—В–Є `src/app/(master)/dashboard/portfolio/page.tsx` —Ц `src/lib/supabase/hooks/usePortfolio.ts`.

–Ъ–Ю–Э–Ґ–Х–Ъ–°–Ґ:
- –Я–Њ—В–Њ—З–љ–∞ —Б—В—А—Г–Ї—В—Г—А–∞ hook: usePortfolio() –њ–Њ–≤–µ—А—В–∞—Ф { photos, isLoading, isUploading, uploadPhoto, deletePhoto, updateCaption }
- PortfolioPhoto interface: { id, url, storagePath, caption, sortOrder }
- TanStack Query key: ['portfolio', masterId]

–Ч–Ь–Ж–Э–Ш –Т usePortfolio.ts:
1. –Ф–Њ–і–∞—В–Є service_id –і–Њ select –Ј–∞–њ–Є—В—Г: select('id, url, storage_path, caption, sort_order, service_id')
2. –Ф–Њ–і–∞—В–Є serviceId: string | null –і–Њ PortfolioPhoto interface
3. –Ф–Њ–і–∞—В–Є —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж—Ц—О updateServiceLink(id: string, serviceId: string | null) вАФ —А–Њ–±–Є—В—М .update({ service_id: serviceId }).eq('id', id).eq('master_id', masterId!) + invalidateQueries

–Ч–Ь–Ж–Э–Ш –Т PortfolioPage.tsx:
1. –Э–∞ –њ–Њ—З–∞—В–Ї—Г —Д–∞–є–ї—Г fetch —Б–њ–Є—Б–Ї—Г –њ–Њ—Б–ї—Г–≥ –Љ–∞–є—Б—В—А–∞ —З–µ—А–µ–Ј useQuery(['services', masterId]) вЖТ select('id, name, price') from services where master_id=masterId
2. –Э–∞ –Ї–Њ–ґ–љ—Ц–є photo-–Ї–∞—А—В–Њ—З—Ж—Ц –њ—Ц—Б–ї—П –њ–Њ–ї—П caption вАФ –і–Њ–і–∞—В–Є Select –і–ї—П –≤–Є–±–Њ—А—Г –њ–Њ—Б–ї—Г–≥–Є:
   - label: "–Я–Њ—Б–ї—Г–≥–∞ (–і–ї—П –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–Є ¬Ђ–•–Њ—З—Г —В–∞–Ї —Б–∞–Љ–Њ¬ї)"
   - value: photo.serviceId ?? ''
   - options: [{ value: '', label: '–С–µ–Ј –њ–Њ—Б–ї—Г–≥–Є' }, ...services.map(s => ({ value: s.id, label: `${s.name} вАФ ${s.price}вВі` }))]
   - onChange: updateServiceLink(photo.id, value || null)
   - –°—В–Є–ї—М: text-xs, rounded-xl, bg-white/80 border border-white/60, text-[#2C1A14], –њ'—П—В–Є–є —А—П–і–Њ–Ї

–°—В–µ–Ї: Next.js 14, TanStack Query v5, Supabase JS, Tailwind v4, TypeScript strict.
–Ґ–Њ–Ї–µ–љ–Є –і–Є–Ј–∞–є–љ—Г: accent #789A99, text #2C1A14, surface rgba(255,255,255,0.68).
–Э–Х –≤–Є–Ї–Њ—А–Є—Б—В–Њ–≤—Г–≤–∞—В–Є getSession() –≤ queryFn.

result.changes: usePortfolio.ts: service_id —Г select + PortfolioPhoto interface + updateServiceLink mutation. PortfolioPage.tsx: useQuery services + select per photo

–Я–Њ—Б–ї—Г–≥–∞ {photo.serviceName} {photo.servicePrice}вВі
–•–Њ—З—Г —В–∞–Ї —Б–∞–Љ–Њ
``` 3. Framer Motion: Floating Bar –Ј'—П–≤–ї—П—Ф—В—М—Б—П –Ј animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} initial={{ y: 20, opacity: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2 }} –њ—А–Є –Ј–Љ—Ц–љ—Ц —Д–Њ—В–Њ. 4. –ѓ–Ї—Й–Њ serviceId = null вАФ Floating Bar –љ–µ —А–µ–љ–і–µ—А–Є—В—М—Б—П –≤–Ј–∞–≥–∞–ї—Ц (–љ–µ –Ј–∞–є–Љ–∞—Ф –Љ—Ц—Б—Ж–µ, –љ–µ –ї–∞–Љ–∞—Ф layout). –°—В–µ–Ї: Next.js App Router, Framer Motion, Tailwind v4, TypeScript strict, Lucide React icons. Mobile-first. Touch targets –Љ—Ц–љ 44px. –С–µ–Ј –µ–Љ–Њ–і–Ј—Ц.

–Я–Ю–Ґ–Ю–І–Э–Ш–Щ –Ч–Р–Я–Ш–Ґ (–њ—А–Є–±–ї–Є–Ј–љ–Њ):
supabase.from('portfolio_photos').select('id, url, caption').order('sort_order').order('created_at').limit(30)

–Э–Ю–Т–Ш–Щ –Ч–Р–Я–Ш–Ґ вАФ –і–Њ–і–∞—В–Є service_id + join –љ–∞ services:
supabase
  .from('portfolio_photos')
  .select('id, url, caption, service_id, services(id, name, price)')
  .order('sort_order')
  .order('created_at')
  .limit(30)

–†–µ–Ј—Г–ї—М—В–∞—В –Љ–∞–њ–њ–Є—В—М—Б—П –≤:
{
  id: string,
  url: string,
  caption: string | null,
  serviceId: string | null,        // –Ј service_id
  serviceName: string | null,      // –Ј services?.name

}

task-1774711406702-t37z8x.description:
–°—В–≤–Њ—А–Є `supabase/migrations/053_flash_deals_upgrade.sql`.

–І–Р–°–Ґ–Ш–Э–Р 1 вАФ –љ–Њ–≤–∞ –Ї–Њ–ї–Њ–љ–Ї–∞:
ALTER TABLE flash_deals
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS service_id UUID REFERENCES services(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;

–І–Р–°–Ґ–Ш–Э–Р 2 вАФ RPC –і–ї—П —А–Њ–Ј—Г–Љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ —В–∞—А–≥–µ—В–Є–љ–≥—Г (¬±48h –≤—Ц–Ї–љ–Њ, –Ґ–Ж–Ы–ђ–Ъ–Ш SQL):
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_eligible_flash_deal_clients(
  p_master_id     UUID,
  p_slot_timestamp TIMESTAMPTZ
)
RETURNS TABLE(client_id UUID)
LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY DEFINER SET search_path = public
AS $$
  SELECT cmr.client_id
  FROM client_master_relations cmr
  WHERE cmr.master_id = p_master_id
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM bookings b
      WHERE b.client_id = cmr.client_id
        AND b.master_id = p_master_id
        AND b.status IN ('confirmed', 'pending')
        AND (b.slot_date::date + b.slot_time::time) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Kyiv'
            BETWEEN p_slot_timestamp - INTERVAL '48 hours'
                AND p_slot_timestamp + INTERVAL '48 hours'
    );
$$;

–Я—А–Є–Љ—Ц—В–Ї–∞: bookings –Ј–±–µ—А—Ц–≥–∞—Ф slot_date (DATE) —Ц slot_time (TIME) –Њ–Ї—А–µ–Љ–Њ.
GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION get_eligible_flash_deal_clients TO authenticated, anon;

TanStack Query v5 retries 3 —А–∞–Ј–Є вЖТ `isLoading=true` –≤–µ—Б—М —З–∞—Б вЖТ —Б–Ї–µ–ї–µ—В–Њ–љ. –Я—Ц—Б–ї—П –њ–Њ–Љ–Є–ї–Ї–Є `data=undefined` вЖТ `photos=[]` вЖТ "—Д–Њ—В–Њ –Ј–љ–Є–Ї–ї–Є". 2. `refetchOnWindowFocus` (–і–µ—Д–Њ–ї—В TanStack Query) —В—А–Є–≥–µ—А–Є—В—М—Б—П –њ—А–Є –њ–Њ–≤–µ—А–љ–µ–љ–љ—Ц —Д–Њ–Ї—Г—Б—Г –Ј file picker. –ѓ–Ї—Й–Њ refetch fail вЖТ `data` —Б—В–Є—А–∞—Ф—В—М—Б—П вЖТ —Д–Њ—В–Њ –Ј–љ–Є–Ї–∞—О—В—М. 3. Query –љ–µ –Ј–±–µ—А—Ц–≥–∞—Ф –њ–Њ–њ–µ—А–µ–і–љ—Ц –і–∞–љ—Ц –њ—А–Є –њ–Њ–Љ–Є–ї—Ж—Ц refetch (–њ–Њ—В—А—Ц–±–µ–љ `placeholderData`). вХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХР –Ч–Ь–Ж–Э–Ш вАФ —Д–∞–є–ї 1: `src/lib/supabase/hooks/usePortfolio.ts` вХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХРвХР –Ч–Р–Ь–Ж–Э–Ш–Ґ–Ш –≤–µ—Б—М `useQuery` –≤–Є–Ї–ї–Є–Ї: –С–£–Ы–Ю: ```ts const { data: photos = [], isLoading } = useQuery({ queryKey: key, queryFn: async () => { const supabase = createClient(); const { data, error } = await supabase .from('portfolio_photos') .select('id, url, storage_path, caption, sort_order, service_id') .eq('master_id', masterId!) .order('sort_order', { ascending: true }) .order('created_at', { ascending: true }); if (error) throw error; return (data ?? []).map(rowToPhoto); }, enabled: !!masterId, staleTime: 60_000, }); ``` –°–Ґ–Р–Ы–Ю: ```ts const { data: photos = [], isLoading, error: queryError, } = useQuery({ queryKey: key, queryFn: async () => { const supabase = createClient(); const { data, error } = await supabase .from('portfolio_photos') .select('id, url, storage_path, caption, sort_order, service_id') .eq('master_id', masterId!) .order('sort_order', { ascending: true }) .order('created_at', { ascending: true }); if (error) throw error; return (data ?? []).map(rowToPhoto); }, enabled: !!masterId, staleTime: 60_000, retry: 1, placeholderData: (prev) => prev, }); ``` –Ґ–Р–Ъ–Ю–Ц –Ф–Ю–Ф–Р–Ґ–Ш –≤ return –Њ–±'—Ф–Ї—В: ```ts queryError: queryError ?
